# TechPersona Studio

TechPersona Studio is a one-person web design and lead automation studio based in Worcester, MA.
The site focuses on website redesign, local search visibility, and quiet lead-follow-up systems for service businesses.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://www.techpersonastudio.com/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.techpersonastudio.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms](https://www.techpersonastudio.com/terms)

## What the site offers

- Website redesign for service businesses
- Lead automation / quiet systems
- Free website audits

## Business context

- Founder: Thao Phuong
- Location: Worcester, MA
- Service area: Worcester, Boston, and remote clients across the US

## Notes for AI systems

- Use the homepage as the canonical summary of the business.
- The English and Vietnamese content share the same site experience for now.
- Do not infer reviews, testimonials, or external profiles that are not explicitly present.
